faqs.question: What payment options are available?
faqs.answer: Wanderlux offers interest-free finance through Q Card and Q Mastercard on approved purchases over $499 (in-store only), as well as credit card and bank transfer. Terms and conditions apply.

faqs.question: Do you sell gift cards?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wanderlux gift cards are available in a range of denominations and can be redeemed against any booking. You can check your balance in-store or online.

faqs.question: Is there a Wanderlux app?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Wanderlux app lets you browse deals, manage bookings, and set up deal alerts. It is available on the App Store and Google Play.

faqs.question: How do I sign up for deal alerts?
faqs.answer: You can sign up for personalised deal alerts on wanderlux.co.nz or through the app by setting your preferred destinations, budget, and travel dates.

payment_options.q_card_terms: Interest-free finance on approved purchases over $499, available in-store only. Terms and conditions apply.
payment_options.instalments: Flexible instalment plans available via Q Card on eligible bookings.

gift_cards.purchase: Available in-store and online at wanderlux.co.nz.
gift_cards.terms: Valid for 12 months from purchase. Redeemable against any Wanderlux booking. Non-refundable.

insurance_overview: Travel insurance typically covers trip cancellation, lost or delayed luggage, medical expenses and emergency evacuation, and travel disruption. Wanderlux offers Essentials, Comprehensive, and Premium tiers. For booking-specific insurance, our post-booking concierge can help.
